mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.course_id, c.course_name, c.description, c.category, c.image_url, c.difficulty_level, c.duration_minutes, c.calories_min, c.calories_max, c.coach_id, u.username AS coach_name, u.avatar AS coach_avatar, s.day_of_week, s.session_date, s.start_time, s.end_time, s.status, s.capacity, s.booked_count, (s.capacity - s.booked_count) AS remaining_count, s.create_time FROM fitness_course_session s INNER JOIN fitness_course c ON s.course_id = c.id AND c.deleted = false LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.coach_id = u.id WHERE s.id = #{sessionId} AND s.deleted = false

SELECT s.id, s.course_id, c.course_name, c.description, c.category, c.image_url, c.difficulty_level, c.duration_minutes, c.calories_min, c.calories_max, c.coach_id, u.username AS coach_name, u.avatar AS coach_avatar, s.day_of_week, s.session_date, s.start_time, s.end_time, s.status, s.capacity, s.booked_count, (s.capacity - s.booked_count) AS remaining_count, s.create_time FROM fitness_course_session s INNER JOIN fitness_course c ON s.course_id = c.id AND c.deleted = false LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.coach_id = u.id WHERE s.deleted = false AND s.session_date >= CURRENT_DATE AND s.status IN (0, 1) AND s.booked_count < s.capacity ORDER BY s.session_date ASC, s.start_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update:
UPDATE fitness_course_session SET booked_count = booked_count + #{delta}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{sessionId} AND deleted = false
AND booked_count < capacity
AND booked_count > 0
